commands.review_summary:
The PR adds two Groq-hosted small model refs to the small live-model priority list and updates the selector tests and live-testing help text.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +8, Docs 0. Total +10 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a test-matrix/docs expansion, not a bug report. Source review shows the changed matrix is used by the `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` live-test selection path.

target.title: test(agents): broaden small live hosted model matrix
target.body:
## Summary
- Add hosted small-model coverage for `groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant` and `groq/openai/gpt-oss-20b` to the small live model priority matrix.
- Keep the Ollama entry in the same small-model family coverage so local/API-like small model behavior stays visible.
- Update the live testing help page to mention hosted small model families.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/model-compat.test.ts docs/reference/test.md`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/model-compat.test.ts --reporter=dot` (114 tests passed)
- AWS Crabbox `check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_1fb668b57083`, run `run_ca4937635680`, exit 0

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: the small live model priority matrix now includes hosted small-model families in addition to Ollama, so the live compatibility lane can exercise API-style small-model behavior.
Real environment tested: local Codex worktree with shared `node_modules` symlink plus AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
Evidence after fix: `run_ca4937635680` completed with exit 0 on provider `aws`, lease `cbx_1fb668b57083`.
Observed result after fix: `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs` changed lanes passed, including typecheck, lint, docs formatting, guards, and import-cycle checks.
What was not tested: no live paid provider calls were executed by this PR; it expands the live-test selection matrix and validates the changed code/docs paths.
